inputs.label: Weight
inputs.businessContext: Body weight in pounds for Rockport walking test estimation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Body weight in pounds for Rockport walking test estimation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Rockport yürüme testi tahmini için vücut ağırlığı (pound)
businessContext_i18n.de: Körpergewicht in Pfund für die Schätzung des Rockport-Gehtests.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids corporel en livres pour l'estimation du test de marche de Rockport.

inputs.label: Gender (1=Male, 0=Female)
inputs.businessContext: Gender encoding: 1 for male, 0 for female.

businessContext_i18n.en: Gender encoding: 1 for male, 0 for female.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Encodage du sexe : 1 pour homme, 0 pour femme.

inputs.label: 1-Mile Walk Time
inputs.businessContext: Duration to walk exactly 1 mile on a flat surface.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration to walk exactly 1 mile on a flat surface.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Düz bir yüzeyde tam olarak 1 mil yürümek için gereken süre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dauer, um genau 1 Meile auf einer ebenen Fläche zu gehen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée pour marcher exactement 1 mile sur une surface plane.

inputs.label: Heart Rate at End
inputs.businessContext: Heart rate in beats per minute measured immediately upon completing the walk.

businessContext_i18n.en: Heart rate in beats per minute measured immediately upon completing the walk.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yürüyüşü tamamladıktan hemen sonra ölçülen dakikadaki kalp atışı sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Herzfrequenz in Schlägen pro Minute, gemessen unmittelbar nach Beendigung des Gehens.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence cardiaque en battements par minute mesurée immédiatement après la marche.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
